query:
SELECT 
  'Total Contacts' as metric, COUNT(*) as count FROM contacts
UNION ALL
SELECT 'LinkedIn Verified', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE enrichment_source = 'linkedin'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'LLM Generated', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE enrichment_source = 'llm'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Manual', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE enrichment_source = 'manual'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'NULL source', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE enrichment_source IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT '--- Confidence ---', 0
UNION ALL
SELECT 'High confidence', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE confidence_score = 'high'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Medium confidence', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE confidence_score = 'medium'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Low confidence', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE confidence_score = 'low'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'NULL confidence', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE confidence_score IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT '--- Verification ---', 0
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Verified', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE verification_status = 'verified'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'AI Suggested', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE verification_status = 'ai_suggested'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Unverified', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE verification_status = 'unverified'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'NULL verification', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE verification_status IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT '--- Scores ---', 0
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Score >= 80', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE verification_score >= 80
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Score 60-79', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE verification_score >= 60 AND verification_score < 80
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Score 40-59', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE verification_score >= 40 AND verification_score < 60
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Score < 40', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE verification_score < 40
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Score NULL', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE verification_score IS NULL;
